flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Drury University rose 23% between 2006 and 2009 ($15.5k → $19.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Drury University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.4k → $36.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Drury University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).
